note: Bug hunt: 15 scout lanes launched in parallel yielded 76 findings across ~25K LOC. The fan-out pattern worked well — scouts returned detailed structured reports. Key friction: couldn't run validation (test command blocked at root — 'do not run tests from root'). Would be useful to have a 'run tests from within package' smart tool or ability to cd into package dirs for test execution. The coordination system's handoff-based communication was solid — scouts returned their findings as structured messages. However, the sheer volume (76 findings) meant I couldn't implement fixes within this session; a future session should focus on the top 10 highest-impact narrow fixes. One gap: I couldn't inspect 2 of 15 scout lanes fully (Memory retention and UI state) — those are lower priority.
